content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the implementation diff in Cargo.toml, src/cli/run.rs, and the associated test updates, plus the current run-state artifact changes. I did not find any fix-now correctness, safety, or robustness issues. I also spot-ran the updated follow-mode, process-backend, and CLI lease-heartbeat tests locally, and they passed.

## Amendments

None.
